title: Computer Studies
subject: Computer Studies
description: Learn about computers, technology, and staying safe online
curriculum: Based on international ICT standards for early primary adapted for Jamaica

sections.name: Parts of a Computer
sections.instruction: Learn the main parts of a computer and what they do.

questions.prompt: Which part of the computer shows pictures and words on the screen?
questions.hint: It looks like a TV screen!

questions.prompt: Which part do you use to TYPE letters and numbers?
questions.hint: It has all the letters of the alphabet!

questions.prompt: Which part do you move around to point at things on the screen?
questions.hint: It has buttons you can click!

questions.prompt: Which part makes sounds come out of the computer?
questions.hint: You use these to listen to music!
It puts words and pictures onto paper!

sections.name: Using a Computer
sections.instruction: Learn how to use a computer properly.

questions.prompt: What does it mean to 'CLICK' the mouse?
questions.hint: You hear a 'click' sound when you do this!
Two quick clicks in a row!

questions.prompt: To TYPE your name, you use the:
questions.hint: This has all the letter keys!

questions.prompt: What should you do BEFORE turning off the computer?
questions.hint: So you don't lose what you were doing!

sections.name: Staying Safe Online
sections.instruction: Important rules for using the internet safely.

questions.prompt: Should you tell strangers online your real name and address?
If you see something scary or bad online, what should you do?
questions.hint: A parent, teacher, or guardian can help!
It's like a secret key that only you should know!

questions.prompt: Should you share your password with friends?
questions.hint: Passwords are like your toothbrush - don't share!

questions.prompt: Who should you ask before downloading a new game?
questions.hint: Always ask a parent or teacher first!

sections.name: Taking Care of Computers
sections.instruction: How to treat computers with care.

questions.prompt: Should you eat or drink near the computer?
How should you treat the computer keyboard?
questions.hint: Be gentle with all computer parts!

questions.prompt: Should you touch the computer screen with dirty hands?
questions.hint: Keep the screen clean and clear!
